title: Accounts Assistant
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

C+H Associates Pte Ltd is a company specialises in Facilities Management & Maintenance and SMART FM Solutions & Consultancy. Leveraging on the highly qualified and experienced staff, we are able to offer comprehensive services throughout the entire life cycle of a facility, such as consultancy, minor construction, project management, integrated facilities management; repair and redecorations and upgrading works.

Job Summary

Perform accurate financial data entry and maintain comprehensive bookkeeping records using the Xero accounting system to support the company’s financial integrity and compliance.

Responsibilities

  • Enter financial data accurately into the Xero accounting system to maintain up-to-date financial records
  • Monitor and report on cash flow by preparing, updating, and verifying financial data within the accounting system
  • Maintain complete and compliant records of all financial transactions in accordance with company policies
  • Assist in preparing documentation for audits, tax submissions, and statutory financial requirements to ensure regulatory compliance
  • Process staff expense claims promptly to support timely reimbursement and financial accuracy
  • Communicate regularly with managers and staff to coordinate accounting activities and provide necessary assistance
  • Support ad-hoc accounting and administrative tasks as required to facilitate smooth financial operations

Required competencies and certifications

  • LCCI, Diploma or equivalent qualification in accounting or a related field
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant bookkeeping experience, preferably within the facility management or construction industry

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Demonstrated knowledge of project management and time management skills to effectively prioritize and complete tasks
  • Proven analytical and problem-solving abilities to resolve accounting discrepancies and improve processes
  • Ability to meet deadlines and work independently or collaboratively within a finance team environment
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) for data analysis and reporting
  • High level of integrity and professionalism in handling confidential financial information

Remuneration shall consummate with qualifications and experience.
